channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government Ramps Up Preparations for 2026 Local Government Elections
item.description: The South African government has intensified efforts to ensure that the 2026 Local Government Elections, scheduled for 4 November, are conducted efficiently and transparently. Cooperative Governance a...

item.title: Supreme Court to Review B.C. Appeal on Mineral Rights and Indigenous Rights Law
item.description: The Supreme Court of Canada has agreed to hear British Columbia's appeal regarding a previous ruling that found the province's mineral claims system inconsistent with the United Nations Declaration on...

item.title: Photographic Journey Through the Home Counties of 1950s England
item.description: Hardwicke Knight’s photography offers a captivating glimpse into the Home Counties of England during the 1950s, capturing the post-war era with remarkable clarity and nostalgia. His images document th...

item.title: Matthew attempts to sow doubt in Stella's feelings about Vincent in 'The Alibi' Episode 47

item.description: President Donald Trump, during a media appearance on a tarmac, spoke about the casualties in the ongoing U.S. conflict with Iran, noting that 13 American service members have died. He compared this fi...

item.title: Trump and Iran Engage in Final Stage of Peace Talks Amid Tensions

item.title: Tanzania Expands Modern Beekeeping with 11,000 Hives and 3,000 Trained Beekeepers
item.description: Tanzania is stepping up efforts to modernize its beekeeping sector during the 2026/2027 financial year. The government plans to distribute 11,000 modern hives and provide training for over 3,000 beeke...

item.title: IMD issues red alert for severe heatwave in Banda, Prayagraj, Chitrakoot and Kaushambi in Uttar Pradesh; Delhi on orange alert with first heatstroke cases reported
item.description: The India Meteorological Department has issued a red alert for four districts in eastern Uttar Pradesh due to severe heatwave conditions. The affected districts are Banda, Prayagraj, Chitrakoot, and K...

item.title: Upper Wawa Dam to Boost Water Supply in Preparation for El Niño
item.description: The Upper Wawa Dam in Rizal is set to contribute additional water supply as the Philippines faces the possibility of an upcoming El Niño, which may result in drier conditions and water shortages in af...

item.title: Deputy President Mashatile speaks at Nepad 25th anniversary business breakfast in Cape Town
item.description: On Thursday, Deputy President Paul Mashatile delivered the keynote address at the Nepad@25 business breakfast held in Cape Town. The event was organised by the African Union Development Agency in coll...

item.title: TeamPCP Cybercrime Group Conducts Large-Scale Supply Chain Attacks on Open Source Software
item.description: TeamPCP, a cybercriminal group, has escalated software supply chain attacks to an unprecedented level, compromising hundreds of open source tools used by developers worldwide. Their latest target was ...

item.title: Form Three Student in Bomet Hospitalised after Classmate Stabbing
item.description: In Bomet County, a 17-year-old Form Three student at Chemalal AIC Secondary School in Konoin is currently fighting for her life at Litein Level Four Hospital following a stabbing incident. The suspect...

item.title: PCSO Reports No Jackpot Winners in Major Lotto Draws for May 21, 2026

item.title: NYSC and NIMC collaborate to simplify registration and verification for corps members
item.description: The National Youth Service Corps (NYSC) don join hand with National Identity Management Commission (NIMC) to make life easier for prospective corps members wey dey all over Nigeria. According to NYSC ...

item.title: Leucine Enhances Mitochondrial Efficiency and Cellular Energy Production
item.description: Researchers at the University of Cologne have identified the essential amino acid leucine as a key regulator of mitochondrial energy production. Mitochondria, the cell's energy powerhouses, rely on sp...

item.title: PMD warns of intense heatwave in Pakistan during Eid holidays
item.description: The Pakistan Meteorological Department (PMD) has issued a warning that moderate to severe heatwave conditions are likely to affect large parts of the country during the Eid ul Adha period, from May 25...

item.title: Trump's Endorsement of Ken Paxton Could Risk Republican Senate Seat in Texas
